expectations.text: Response detects bun as package manager
expectations.evidence: Step 1 explicitly states 'Package manager: bun (detected from your setup)'. All install commands use 'bun add -D'. Build and deploy commands use 'bun run build' and 'bun run deploy'.

Step 1 states 'Framework: TanStack Start (React) -- identified by @tanstack/react-start in dependencies'. Configures viteEnvironment: { name: "ssr" } for TanStack Start, and sets main to '@tanstack/react-start/server-entry' in wrangler.jsonc.

Step 3 creates apps/web/wrangler.jsonc with $schema, name, compatibility_date, compatibility_flags: ["nodejs_compat"], main pointing to TanStack Start server entry, and observability enabled. Includes detailed field explanations table.

expectations.text: Response adds cloudflare() plugin to vite.config.ts
expectations.evidence: Step 4 shows importing cloudflare from '@cloudflare/vite-plugin' and adding 'cloudflare({ viteEnvironment: { name: "ssr" } })' as the first plugin in the plugins array. Explicitly states it must be the first plugin.

expectations.text: Response adds deploy script to package.json
expectations.evidence: Step 5 shows adding 'deploy': 'wrangler deploy' to apps/web/package.json scripts alongside dev, build, and serve scripts.
